  [37mRan [1m1[0m[37m shell command [39m

[97m⏺[39m hello-from-claude

[37m✻[39m [37mCogitated for 4s[39m

[37m[100m❯ [97mUse the Edit tool to change /tmp/nonexistent-file-xyz.txt - this should ask permission[39m

[97m[49m⏺[39m I'll try to edit that file. Note that the Edit tool requires reading the file first, so let me try reading it.

  [37mRead [1m1[0m[37m file [39m

[97m⏺[39m The file doesn't exist, so I can't use Edit on it (Edit requires the file to exist and be read first). Would you like me to create the file with the Write tool instead?

[37m✻[39m [37mBaked for 5s[39m

[37m[100m❯ [97mRun the bash command: rm /tmp/some-test-file-doesnotexist[39m

[37m[49m⏺[39m Running [1m1[0m shell command…
[37m  ⎿  $ rm /tmp/some-test-file-doesnotexist[39m

   [37mRemove test file[39m
